jdk.dynalink.support/ChainedCallSite/rel.name: relink
signatures: public void relink(GuardedInvocation guardedInvocation, MethodHandle relinkAndInvoke)
jdk.dynalink.support/ChainedCallSite/rel.description:
This method will be called by the dynamic linker every time the call site
is relinked (but seeRelinkableCallSite.resetAndRelink(GuardedInvocation, MethodHandle)for an
exception).

info.excerpt:
This method will be called by the dynamic linker every time the call site
is relinked (but seeRelinkableCallSite.resetAndRelink(GuardedInvocation, MethodHandle)for an
exception).

jdk.dynalink.support/ChainedCallSite/res.name: resetAndRelink
signatures: public void resetAndRelink(GuardedInvocation guardedInvocation, MethodHandle relinkAndInvoke)
jdk.dynalink.support/ChainedCallSite/res.description:
This method will be called by the dynamic linker every time the call site
is relinkedandthe linker wishes the call site to throw away any
prior linkage state (that is how it differs fromRelinkableCallSite.relink(GuardedInvocation, MethodHandle)).
